mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_applications (user_id, job_id, resume_url, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobId}, #{resumeUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, job_id, resume_url, status, created_at, updated_at FROM job_applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, job_id AS jobId, resume_url AS resumeUrl, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM job_applications WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE job_applications SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.job_id AS jobId, j.job_name AS jobName, a.user_id AS applicantId, u.nickname AS applicantNickname, u.email AS applicantEmail, a.resume_url AS resumeUrl, a.status, a.created_at AS createdAt FROM job_applications a INNER JOIN job_positions j ON a.job_id = j.id AND j.user_id = #{enterpriseUserId} LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id, a.job_id AS jobId, j.job_name AS jobName, COALESCE(e.enterprise_name, e.nickname, e.email) AS companyName, a.resume_url AS resumeUrl, a.status, a.created_at AS createdAt FROM job_applications a INNER JOIN job_positions j ON a.job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN users e ON j.user_id = e.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
